description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script installing openssh-client if missing, starts ssh-agent, adds the $SSH_PRIVATE_KEY, creates ~/.ssh and disables strict host key checking when running inside Docker. Define three stages: build-lib, build, and test. Add a build-lib job in the build-lib stage using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/fruits.confits/qt-builder:5.10.0 that executes "git clone git@gitlab.com:fruits.confits/CuteLogger.git dependencies" and then "cd dependencies && qmake && make && make install", and publishes the directories dependencies/lib/ and dependencies/include/ as artifacts. Add a build job in the build stage that depends on build-lib, uses the same Qt builder image, and runs "qmake && make". Add a test job in the test stage that runs "echo \"Build OK\"". No caches, services, or deployment targets are defined.
